programmes.show_description: Poppy and Milo are getting engaged, but only so that she can advance her career and he can move into a penthouse. It's purely transactional. Or is it? (2022)
A chance encounter on Valentine's Day brings Hannah and Finn together as they race through New York City to return a lost engagement ring and save one couple's special day. (2025)
When two colleagues are mistaken for a couple, they must keep up appearances to not disappoint their biggest client. But could their little white lie turn into something more? (2023)

When Tamara visits her family's apple orchard, she reconnects with her childhood best friend and together they fight - armed with pastry and passion - to keep the orchard alive. (2022)
When Lisa returns home, she meets Will, a writer tasked with fixing her biography. Love is the last thing on her mind, but will she find time for an unexpected romance? (2022)
When Amanda is partnered up with Sam at work, she has no idea that he is the man she has been flirting with in a chatroom. Can their fiery online chemistry hold up in real life? (2022)
After training in Paris, a perfumer swaps the capital of France for her small home town in the US, where she rents a shop front for her new perfumery from a handsome businessman. (2022)
After having recurring dreams about a handsome stranger named Michael, Grace is shocked when she bumps into him in real life - but he has no idea who she is. (2024)
When Lea is tasked with designing the cover of a new hit romance novel, she meets the author - the seemingly snobbish Michael. Can she learn not to judge a book by its cover? (2023)
Lilly, a hopeless romantic and literary enthusiast, is surprised when her wish to talk to her favourite author comes true and Jane Austen herself appears in her life. (2024)
When a psychic tells Charlotte she is destined to marry her best friend, Rory, only one thing stands in her way... his fiancée. (2023)
A single mum agrees to be the partner of a bird enthusiast for a competition but misunderstands and tells everyone she's his new girlfriend instead of just his teammate. (2025)
A single mother, surprised by her daughter's recent engagement, travels to the Gulf Shores where she unexpectedly finds love. (2023)
A mutual love of Jane Austen's stories causes an overly serious scholar and an actor playing Mr Darcy to fall head over heels into their own fairy tale romance. (2024)

When the older brother of the bride catches perpetual bridesmaid Cate's eye, she must choose between fanning old flames and lighting new ones. (2021)
The Island team meets their Mystery Mountain counterparts for a friendly murder game, but the fun ends with a murder in plain sight. (2025)
A chance encounter on Valentine's Day brings Hannah and Finn together as they race through New York City to return a lost engagement ring and save one couple's special day. (2025)
When two colleagues are mistaken for a couple, they must keep up appearances to not disappoint their biggest client. But could their little white lie turn into something more? (2023)
When Sophie secures her dream job, she dives headfirst into her new role. But the owner's son soon begins to make her life hell. (2023)
Poppy and Milo are getting engaged, but only so that she can advance her career and he can move into a penthouse. It's purely transactional. Or is it? (2022)
A hockey player falls for a real estate agent when he's traded to her hometown and moves into the cottage in her hockey-loving family's backyard. (2023)
Surprises are in store for Ilana when she travels to Santorini with her Greek boyfriend Mike for a family wedding. (2023)
